mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM self_heal_event
AND project_id = #{projectId}
SELECT * FROM self_heal_event WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND node_id = #{nodeId} ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO self_heal_event (project_id, node_id, event_type, retry_count, max_retries, detail, process_pid, create_time) VALUES (#{projectId}, #{nodeId}, #{eventType}, #{retryCount}, #{maxRetries}, #{detail}, #{processPid}, #{createTime})
